tagline: A centered auth card with logo, title, form, and an optional brand aside.
whenToUse: Authentication Layout is the centered card shell for sign-in, sign-up, and password-reset: logo, an h1, the form slot, switch-mode footer links, and an optional brand panel on wide screens. Auth errors render in a live Alert the host focuses on failed submit. It owns the single main landmark for these unauthenticated pages.
